evals.description: Agent correctly identifies ResidentialLoanApplication as the hub object, not MortgageApplication
evals.input: What is the central hub object for FSC Mortgage Origination in Salesforce?

evals.description: Agent correctly distinguishes LoanApplicant (borrower person) from LoanApplicationProperty (collateral)
evals.input: I need to store the subject property address and the borrower's address. Which FSC Mortgage objects do I use?

evals.description: Agent correctly models co-borrower as a second LoanApplicant with RoleOnLoan = CoBorrower
evals.input: How do I add a co-borrower to a ResidentialLoanApplication in FSC?
expected_topics: exactly one Borrower role per application
must_not_contain: add a field to the hub object

evals.description: Agent correctly identifies DTI as a calculated value from LoanApplicantIncome and LoanApplicantLiability, not a stored field
evals.input: Where is the Debt-to-Income ratio stored in FSC Mortgage, and how is it calculated?
expected_topics: DTI is not a stored standard field

evals.description: Agent correctly maps URLA Section 2c liabilities to LoanApplicantLiability
evals.input: URLA Section 2c covers the borrower's existing debts and liabilities. Which FSC object captures this data?

evals.description: Agent correctly lists HMDA LAR required fields and their FSC source objects
evals.input: What HMDA fields does FSC Mortgage need to capture, and where do they live in the data model?
expected_topics: census tract must come from geocoder

evals.description: Agent correctly states the 3-business-day Loan Estimate requirement and how to implement it in Salesforce
evals.input: What are the TRID timing requirements for the Loan Estimate, and how should I implement them in Salesforce FSC?
expected_topics: business day calculation excludes Sundays and federal holidays
TRID clock does not start automatically
must_not_contain: Closing Disclosure within 3 days of application

evals.description: Agent correctly calculates LTV using LoanApplicationProperty fields
evals.input: How is Loan-to-Value (LTV) calculated in FSC Mortgage, and which fields feed into it?
must_not_contain: LTV is stored as a standard field

evals.description: Agent correctly identifies rate lock fields on ResidentialLoanApplication and the absence of a native RateLockHistory object
evals.input: What fields does FSC Mortgage provide for rate lock tracking, and how do I track rate lock history?
expected_topics: custom RateLockHistory__c child object for lock extensions
scheduled Flow alert within 5 business days of expiry
must_not_contain: FSC provides a standard RateLockHistory object
rate lock fields are on LoanApplicant

evals.description: Agent correctly describes the LOS integration pattern with Named Credentials and conflict resolution
evals.input: How should I integrate Salesforce FSC Mortgage with an external LOS like Encompass?
expected_topics: outbound Platform Event or callout on status change
must_not_contain: Salesforce has a native Encompass connector

evals.description: Agent correctly states that FSC does not ship a native conditions object and describes the custom LoanCondition__c pattern
evals.input: How does FSC Mortgage handle underwriting conditions management? Is there a standard object?
expected_topics: no native conditions object in standard FSC
Prior to Docs vs Prior to Funding
ClearToClose requires all Prior to Docs conditions satisfied
must_not_contain: FSC ships a standard LoanCondition object

evals.description: Agent correctly describes MISMO 3.4 XML export pattern and which FSC objects map to MISMO elements
evals.input: How do I generate a MISMO 3.4 XML export from Salesforce FSC Mortgage for investor delivery?
expected_topics: Named Credential for delivery to GSE or LOS
